## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Attention and GrowthX to discuss SEO strategy, performance, and future collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/K__ySNFy8KqDNv1CyPwTDo4a1Eq6J2_T?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Attention plans to pause their contract with GrowthX, citing a need to prioritize efforts elsewhere](https://fathom.video/share/K__ySNFy8KqDNv1CyPwTDo4a1Eq6J2_T?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [GrowthX identified key SEO opportunities for Attention, including schema implementation and content optimization](https://fathom.video/share/K__ySNFy8KqDNv1CyPwTDo4a1Eq6J2_T?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
  - [Attention is shifting focus to ABM tactics for their high-ACV, top-down sales approach](https://fathom.video/share/K__ySNFy8KqDNv1CyPwTDo4a1Eq6J2_T?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
  - [GrowthX offered potential support for Attention's ABM efforts through AI-powered research and personalization](https://fathom.video/share/K__ySNFy8KqDNv1CyPwTDo4a1Eq6J2_T?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)

## Topics

### Contract Status and Priorities

  - [Attention's contract with GrowthX expired on March 23rd](https://fathom.video/share/K__ySNFy8KqDNv1CyPwTDo4a1Eq6J2_T?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [Attention plans to pause the engagement to focus on other priorities](https://fathom.video/share/K__ySNFy8KqDNv1CyPwTDo4a1Eq6J2_T?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Programmatic SEO is not currently a top priority for Attention](https://fathom.video/share/K__ySNFy8KqDNv1CyPwTDo4a1Eq6J2_T?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)

### SEO Performance Overview

  - [145 articles published, generating 1,210 clicks and 676,000 impressions](https://fathom.video/share/K__ySNFy8KqDNv1CyPwTDo4a1Eq6J2_T?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Impressions growing, clicks consistent, but CTR remains low](https://fathom.video/share/K__ySNFy8KqDNv1CyPwTDo4a1Eq6J2_T?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [Recent Google core update may have positively impacted average position](https://fathom.video/share/K__ySNFy8KqDNv1CyPwTDo4a1Eq6J2_T?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)

### SEO Optimization Opportunities

  - [Implement author bylines, breadcrumb schema, and article schema](https://fathom.video/share/K__ySNFy8KqDNv1CyPwTDo4a1Eq6J2_T?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
  - [Article schema crucial for inclusion in AI-powered search results (e.g., Bing Copilot)](https://fathom.video/share/K__ySNFy8KqDNv1CyPwTDo4a1Eq6J2_T?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [Review and optimize non-blog pages for specific keywords](https://fathom.video/share/K__ySNFy8KqDNv1CyPwTDo4a1Eq6J2_T?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
  - [Consider creative solutions for balancing SEO and CRO in page headers (e.g., using subtle "eyebrow" text)](https://fathom.video/share/K__ySNFy8KqDNv1CyPwTDo4a1Eq6J2_T?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)

### Content Strategy and Topical Relevance

  - [Two topical silos (Who's Who pages and company/salary content) may be diluting Attention's AI/sales authority](https://fathom.video/share/K__ySNFy8KqDNv1CyPwTDo4a1Eq6J2_T?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
  - [Recommendation: No-index and no-follow these pages to focus on AI-relevant content](https://fathom.video/share/K__ySNFy8KqDNv1CyPwTDo4a1Eq6J2_T?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
  - [Optimize homepage and key pages for primary keywords (e.g., "AI sales agents" or "AI sales coach")](https://fathom.video/share/K__ySNFy8KqDNv1CyPwTDo4a1Eq6J2_T?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)

### Attention's Current Marketing Focus

  - [Shifting towards ABM tactics for their high-ACV, top-down sales approach](https://fathom.video/share/K__ySNFy8KqDNv1CyPwTDo4a1Eq6J2_T?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
  - [Focusing on direct mail, SDR outreach, and targeted LinkedIn ads](https://fathom.video/share/K__ySNFy8KqDNv1CyPwTDo4a1Eq6J2_T?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)
  - [Less emphasis on capturing long-tail search intent](https://fathom.video/share/K__ySNFy8KqDNv1CyPwTDo4a1Eq6J2_T?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)

### Potential Future Collaboration

  - [GrowthX offered to support Attention's ABM efforts with AI-powered research and personalization](https://fathom.video/share/K__ySNFy8KqDNv1CyPwTDo4a1Eq6J2_T?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Discussed possibility of creating high-quality, manually crafted content optimized for AI search engines](https://fathom.video/share/K__ySNFy8KqDNv1CyPwTDo4a1Eq6J2_T?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)
  - [GrowthX open to brainstorming sessions to explore evolving collaboration opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/K__ySNFy8KqDNv1CyPwTDo4a1Eq6J2_T?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Attention to review and consider GrowthX's SEO recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/K__ySNFy8KqDNv1CyPwTDo4a1Eq6J2_T?tab=summary&timestamp=1828.0)
  - [Attention to focus on executing their ABM strategy](https://fathom.video/share/K__ySNFy8KqDNv1CyPwTDo4a1Eq6J2_T?tab=summary&timestamp=1828.0)
  - [Potential future discussion on strategic SEO and content collaboration when Attention reassesses priorities](https://fathom.video/share/K__ySNFy8KqDNv1CyPwTDo4a1Eq6J2_T?tab=summary&timestamp=1828.0)
  - [GrowthX remains open to brainstorming sessions and exploring ways to support Attention's evolving needs](https://fathom.video/share/K__ySNFy8KqDNv1CyPwTDo4a1Eq6J2_T?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
